source_provenance.claim: Loop stage order is derived from loop YAML when available.
source_provenance.verification: tests/contracts/loop-run-contract.test.js loads templates/QA/loops/spec-build.yaml and asserts stage ids.

source_provenance.claim: Bounded run-until-terminal stops at a real terminal condition and records ledger evidence.
source_provenance.verification: tests/contracts/loop-run-contract.test.js asserts a Gate B pass followed by a GATE_B5 agent_action_required prompt.

source_provenance.claim: Generative stages produce durable prompt files with human-gate constraints.
source_provenance.verification: tests/contracts/loop-run-contract.test.js re-reads the generated prompt and checks current stage plus never_without_human.

source_provenance.claim: Provider session ids are parsed and resume arguments are generated for Claude and Codex.
source_provenance.verification: tests/contracts/loop-run-contract.test.js checks Claude --resume and Codex exec resume argv.

source_provenance.claim: Diff provenance rejects suspicious value-bearing literals and unallowed test-double paths.
source_provenance.verification: tests/contracts/provenance-gate.test.js rejects a region_code literal and permits only explicitly contract-allowed opt-in smoke wording.

source_provenance.claim: Fresh install verification fails when adapter policy templates are missing.
source_provenance.verification: tests/hooks/installer-fixes.test.js expects missing .specflow/adapter-policies/claude-print.safe.yml to fail install health.

source_provenance.claim: Gate C status is exposed as a CLI readback command.
source_provenance.verification: Manual CLI surface review plus package command help; live gh readback remains environment-dependent.
